title: Quote YAML frontmatter with colons and backticks in spec pages

source.subject: fix(spec): quote YAML frontmatter strings containing colons / backticks

body:
## What shipped

Quotes YAML frontmatter strings containing colons or backticks so Starlight/trudoc MDX validation passes.

## Source commit

Repository **`beskid`** · commit `c2dece3`

> fix(spec): quote YAML frontmatter strings containing colons / backticks

## Completed

2026-05-23 (catalog cutoff window).
